content:
﻿.. _dp-FlashCompensation:

CrDeviceProperty_FlashCompensation
==================================

Get/Set the Flash Compensation

    CrDataType: `CrDataType_Int16Array`

.. list-table::
  :widths: auto
  :header-rows: 1

  * - Parameter Code
    - Explanation

  * - Any
    - | The value is obtained by multiplying a real Flash Compensation value by 1000.
      | e.g.) 0xEC78 = -5000 (means -5.0Ev)
      |         0x0000 = 0 (means 0.0Ev)
      |         0x1388 = 5000 (means 5.0Ev)
